race.comment: MORE LIKELY (4) was far too good over this course and distance last time out, finishing 1.3L off the winner at this track and trip most recently. Back to a BM58+ here sees him only rise 2kg and Faithfull sticks with him. Loves this track and trip and he can repeat the dose. BIONDO (9) is knocking on the door of a drought-breaking win, finishing 2.7L off the winner in a solid performance here last time out. The wide draw is a niggle, but he ticks plenty of boxes on his recent form and he's not to be discounted. MIDNIGHT RUSH (2) gets Wheatley back on board today after dropping right back an unsuitable trip last start. His last run over this track and trip was very good in tougher grade back in January. Can see him turning his recent form right around. TITAN RISING (6) has strong claims getting back out to the mile now. STEPCHILD (5) flew home to score in a CL2 last start and can go on with the job.
